query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS design_submissions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('apparel', 'accessories', 'print', 'digital', 'promotional', 'other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'apparel',
  product_type VARCHAR(100),
  design_concept TEXT,
  target_audience VARCHAR(255),
  estimated_cost DECIMAL(10,2),
  estimated_price DECIMAL(10,2),
  submitted_by_id INT,
  submitted_by_name VARCHAR(255),
  department VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Design',
  house_id INT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'submitted', 'in_review', 'revision_requested', 'approved', 'rejected', 'in_production', 'completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  priority ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent') DEFAULT 'medium',
  mockup_urls TEXT,
  attachments TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  submitted_at BIGINT,
  approved_at BIGINT,
  approved_by_id INT,
  approved_by_name VARCHAR(255)
);
